title: Develop a counterargument
subtitle: Answer an objection with respect and precision.
duolingoBridge: Growth bridges B1 output into B2 preparation through native-style input, longer reasoning, nuance, synthesis, register control, and autonomous correction.
overview: Knowledge point 1: present an objection fairly.
Knowledge point 2: explain why it does not fully convince you.

sections.title: B2 bridge tools
rows: il ne prend pas en compte...
it does not take into account...
however, it seems to me that...
that is why I maintain that...

items.fr: On pourrait me répondre que la grammaire doit passer avant l’écoute.
items.en: One could answer me that grammar must come before listening.
items.es: Se me podría responder que la gramática debe ir antes que la escucha.

items.fr: Cet argument est valable pour certaines personnes.
items.en: This argument is valid for some people.
items.es: Este argumento es válido para algunas personas.

items.fr: Mais il ne prend pas en compte la réalité de la communication orale.
items.en: But it does not take into account the reality of oral communication.
items.es: Pero no tiene en cuenta la realidad de la comunicación oral.

items.fr: Cependant, il me semble que l’écoute donne un contexte aux règles.
items.en: However, it seems to me that listening gives context to rules.
items.es: Sin embargo, me parece que la escucha da contexto a las reglas.

items.fr: C’est pourquoi je maintiens que l’oreille doit travailler dès le début.
items.en: That is why I maintain that the ear must work from the beginning.
items.es: Por eso mantengo que el oído debe trabajar desde el principio.
